name: summit-concepts
description: The Summit Concept Framework as one plugin. summit-new-canvas: flesh a raw idea into a designed HTML sketch grounded in Summit's business, data and asset shelf; summit-concept: register, import, build and submit a concept; summit-cdr: harvest CDRs, freeze, promote and hand off; summit-vi-report-writer: safely build, extend, repair and validate Visual Insights report JSON. Concept runs publish to the X:\Labs Concept Dashboard.
